items.text: This headphone has incredible bass and the battery lasts forever.
Battery died after one week, charger broken too.
Sound quality is okay but the build feels cheap.
Loving the noise cancellation feature, perfect for travel.
Bluetooth keeps disconnecting every five minutes, frustrating.
Comfortable cushions, can wear them all day without ear pain.
Microphone quality is terrible, my colleagues cannot hear me on calls.
Excellent battery life and the charging is super fast.
Build quality is premium, feels worth every penny.
Bluetooth connection is rock solid, never had a dropout.
Cushions started peeling after a month, very disappointing.
Sound is crisp and clear, microphone picks up my voice perfectly.
